items.title: [正面] Бесплатный slay the spire с неплохим сюжетом и при...
items.summary:
Бесплатный slay the spire с неплохим сюжетом и приятным стилем. Декбилдинг тут наполовину заменён тимбилдингом: удачи найти 4 персонажей, которые хорошо сочетаются друг с другом, а не просто имеют крутые сами по себе карты.
На русский язык переводил ИИ! Играйте на английском. Но игруха явно стоит внимания, особенно если вам нравится механика пошагового карточного боя.

items.title: [正面] Im will keep it short and sweet, This is my favori...
items.summary: Im will keep it short and sweet, This is my favorite gacha game ive played so far. But there always seems to be a downside. The game keep crashing , whenever i do a story chapter ( the non combat stories) it crashes about 90% of the time. If it wasnt for this one big flaw this game would be absolutely perfect. But please fix these crashes, its extremely annoying. Aside from that id still recommend this game
items.review: Im will keep it short and sweet, This is my favorite gacha game ive played so far. But there always seems to be a downside. The game keep crashing , whenever i do a story chapter ( the non combat stories) it crashes about 90% of the time. If it wasnt for this one big flaw this game would be absolutely perfect. But please fix these crashes, its extremely annoying. Aside from that id still recommend this game

items.title: [正面] The game is a bit longer to start compared to some...
items.summary: The game is a bit longer to start compared to some other gachas, I found myself having to skip the wonderfull story at the begening just to access the newest/limited content. Otherwise great game overall, I recommand you give it a try if you like a good story, the chtullu lore and truly unique characters

items.title: [正面] its super fun, I have over 200 hours on mobile and...
items.summary: its super fun, I have over 200 hours on mobile and have been playing for around 9+ months now. The multiplayer traphase mode reminds me of super auto pets and is super addictive/fun and has actually challenging team building where you can pull off crazy combos. Also i love my husband pickman. good game if you like twunks/twinks and DILFs and overall baddies/divas. it puts the slayyyy in slay the spire-likes.
